case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. GREIG MCKALE ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MCKALE, GREIG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2021
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200020190), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SERVED NOV-20-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCKALE, GREIG
